views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Active shopping list grouped by category with swipe-to-check, progress ring showing list completion percentage, stat cards for estimated total and items remaining, and a floating quick-add button

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Add new grocery item with item name field, category picker with icons, quantity stepper with unit selector, price estimate, priority badge selector, and optional notes

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Past shopping trips grouped by date showing items purchased per trip, total spent, completion rate per trip, and a calendar heatmap of shopping activity

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly and monthly spending trend line charts, category breakdown pie chart, top 10 most frequently bought items ranked list, budget vs actual bar comparison, and AI-generated shopping insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uncheckedItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All items on the active list not yet checked off, sorted by priority (essential first) then category

viewModelComputedProperties.name: checkedItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All items marked as purchased today, sorted by check-off time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentListItemCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of unchecked items remaining on the active shopping list

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentListProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of today's list completed: checkedItems.count / (checkedItems.count + uncheckedItems.count), returns 0.0-1.0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: estimatedTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of (estimatedPrice * quantity) for all unchecked items on the current list

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todaySpent
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of (estimatedPrice * quantity) for all items checked off today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklySpending
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total spending for the current Mon-Sun week computed from all checked items

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekSpending
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total spending for the prior Mon-Sun week for trend comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklySpendingTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change: (weeklySpending - previousWeekSpending) / previousWeekSpending * 100. Positive means spending more.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All checked items grouped by category with item count and total spending, sorted by total descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topFrequentItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 10 most frequently added item names across all history, for smart suggestions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageTripCost
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average total spending per distinct shopping day over the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: shoppingStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of consecutive calendar weeks with at least one item checked off

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlySpendingData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily spending totals for the last 30 days aggregated by date, used for trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: budgetProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: weeklySpending / weeklyBudgetGoal clamped to 0.0-1.0 for progress ring display

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dynamic insight strings: budget alerts, top category shifts, forgotten items, shopping frequency changes, streak milestones

dailyGoal.description: Weekly grocery budget target in dollars. Displayed as a progress ring on the dashboard; yellow warning at 80%, red at 100%.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A calendar week (Mon-Sun) counts as active if at least one grocery item was checked off as purchased. Streak resets if an entire week passes with no purchases.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary metric: weekly total spending compared to previous week and 4-week rolling average. Secondary metrics: category distribution shift (e.g., produce share increasing), shopping trip frequency (days between trips), and per-item price changes over 4 weeks. Flag anomalies when weekly spending exceeds budget by >20% or a single category exceeds 40% of total.
insights: Budget status: 'You've spent $X of your $Y weekly budget (Z%)' with color-coded indicator
Spending trend: 'Spending is up/down X% compared to last week' with directional arrow
Top category: 'Your biggest category this week is X ($Y) — was Z last week'
Frequently forgotten: items added to 3+ lists but checked off less than 50% of the time
Shopping frequency: 'You shop every X days on average — trending more/less frequent'
Smart suggestions: 'You usually buy [items] every week — add them to today's list?'
Streak milestone: 'N weeks of organized grocery shopping! Keep it up.'
